purpose: Prioritised nearby theatre and family/young-public sources to promote into structured scrapers when they prove parseable. URLs were web_fetch-checked on 2026-06-12; use root URLs when a guessed deep link returned 404/500.

sources.name: Théâtre du Passage — Pass’famille
sources.familyRelevance: High: official family-labelled programme; already used to confirm/correct Johan OCR entries.
sources.implementationNotes: Prefer official dates/times from this page over OCR. Confirmed manual events may keep sourceFiles as secondary provenance.

sources.name: Le Pommier — Théâtre à Neuchâtel
sources.familyRelevance: High: young-public menu exists and several Johan OCR entries point to Le Pommier, but guessed deep links returned 404.
sources.implementationNotes: Inspect homepage/menu HTML or site API before scraping; do not invent deep paths. Keep OCR-only Pommier entries in needs_review until matched officially.

sources.name: Théâtre Benno Besson — Jeune Public
sources.familyRelevance: High: local Yverdon theatre with young-public page; some TBB events already appear via Infomaniak/Yverdon sources.
sources.implementationNotes: Wix/dynamic page; use as official verification target and investigate static payload/API before adding a scraper.

sources.name: L’Échandole
sources.familyRelevance: High: local Yverdon theatre; events already appear indirectly through regional/ticketing sources.
sources.implementationNotes: Root page verified; next step is direct programme endpoint/API discovery rather than relying only on aggregators.

sources.name: leprogramme.ch — Enfants / Vaud-Genève cultural aggregator
sources.familyRelevance: Medium-high: root exposes an Enfants category; guessed Vaud child path returned 500 during verification.
sources.implementationNotes: Discover the actual stable category/filter URL from live HTML before scraper work; root only until then.

sources.name: TempsLibre — Romandie weekend agenda
sources.familyRelevance: Medium: existing active scraper can surface ateliers/spectacles and is useful as dedupe/verification source.
sources.implementationNotes: Already integrated as tempsLibre; keep as broad aggregator, not a replacement for official theatre pages.

sources.name: Vaudfamille
sources.familyRelevance: Medium: family-oriented site, but a guessed agenda path returned 404 and needs discovery before use.
sources.implementationNotes: Only promote after finding a stable current agenda/listing URL.

sources.name: Au Lac Grandson — Quais de Grandson
sources.familyRelevance: High local relevance: Au Lac Grandson publishes a full summer programme on the Quais de Grandson (1er juin–19 juillet 2026), with family-friendly outdoor events, food, concerts, lake activities and recurring opportunities; added from Johan’s photo as an ongoing summer information source, not a one-off 21 June event.
sources.implementationNotes: Treat as a full-season/summer programme source. Root page verified on 2026-06-20; next step is to inspect the programme/event data on the site and add a scraper or recurring manual import if parseable. Keep Johan’s flyer photo as discovery provenance for the 2026 season.

sources.name: La FMY — Programme
sources.familyRelevance: High local relevance: La FMY publishes a yearly programme in Yverdon with family-friendly festival activities and a downloadable official programme PDF.
sources.implementationNotes: Programme page verified on 2026-06-21 and currently links to the 2026 PDF. For future years, monitor this stable /programme/ page, extract the current PDF URL, parse event dates/times when possible, and keep it as a recurring annual source rather than a one-off event.
